creator: markd@grizzly.com
text:
>From: j@uriah.heep.sax.de (J Wunsch)

Hey mate, thanks for all the info.

>Eeek, no:
>
>>     ahc0: target 0 Tagged Queuing Device
>>     (ahc0:0:0): "HP C3725S 6039" type 0 fixed SCSI 2
>>     sd0(ahc0:0:0): Direct-Access 2047MB (4194058 512 byte sectors)
>
>This one is known to choke on tagged commands!

Ack....

Perhaps there should be a warning in LINT about this.  Not booting after
adding a option is no big deal, but destorying a disk after many days of use
is rather painful.

Thanks, I owe you a beer,
Mark
